title: Thunbergia erecta
taxonomy: Thunbergia erecta belongs to the family Acanthaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the acanthus or thorny flower family. This family is a part of the order Lamiales, which includes plants such as mint and basil. Thunbergia erecta is further classified as a genus of flowering plants, specifically within the subfamily Thunbergioideae. This classification places it closely related to other genera such as Amisita and Thunbergia. The species is native to tropical Africa and is often used as an ornamental plant.
